warnings.detail: Exact metadata still requires a direct verification fetch.
Repository metadata reports size 0. No deletion/archive inference is permitted.
Default branch is dev; branch inventory must use repository metadata rather than main/master assumptions.
Inspect credentials, endpoints, deployment artifacts and sensitive configuration before migration.
Inspect secrets, business data and unique domain logic before any family consolidation.
Security/authentication repository. Inspect secrets, credentials, endpoints, user data and deployment configuration before any migration or consolidation; do not expose sensitive values in reports.
Size equality is not evidence of duplicate content. Commit and tree comparison is required.
Review secrets, authentication configuration, connection strings, endpoints, deployment files and private business logic before migration.
Metadata reports 598607 KB. Inspect large/generated files, binaries, history, credentials and business data before any migration decision.
Size 0 does not establish that the repository is empty or disposable; inspect all branches and history.
Default branch is mostafa20230501; branch inventory must not assume main/master.
Workflow exports can contain credential names, webhook URLs, endpoints or embedded secrets. Scan without publishing sensitive values.
Authentication repository: inspect secrets, identity data, connection strings, signing keys and deployment configuration before migration or consolidation.
Size 0 is not proof of an empty repository. Inspect every branch and commit history before classification.
Metadata reports 128636 KB. Review binaries, generated assets and history before migration.
Inspect configuration and history for API keys or location-service credentials; never publish sensitive values.
Metadata reports 330645 KB. Inspect generated assets, binaries, history, credentials and appointment-domain data before canonical or migration decisions.
Metadata reports 410703 KB. Inspect binaries, generated assets, credentials, deployment configuration and CPD business data before family consolidation.
Metadata reports 427605 KB. Determine fork/upstream status, vendored content, datasets/models and license obligations.
Metadata reports 161285 KB. Review generated assets, binaries, service endpoints, credentials and scheduling data.
Default branch is 20230209; branch inventory must follow repository metadata and inspect all refs.
Face-recognition material may involve biometric datasets, privacy restrictions and model/dataset licenses. Do not infer deployability from public visibility.
